arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta: “Carlo Ancelotti is an inspiration to me”
arts.sum: Arteta was asked about his big Real Madrid test as well as facing Ancelotti in the dugout, to which he said: “He is an inspiration to me. Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta called Carlo Ancelotti an ‘inspiration’ to him in his press conference before Real Madrid on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid: Thibaut Courtois makes major fitness declaration ahead of Arsenal Champions League clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s first-choice stopper is ready to return from injury for the huge showdown at the Emirates

arts.ttl: Arsenal face a tough test against Champions League titans Real Madrid — but have a unique advantage
arts.sum: The Gunners have the weight of history on their shoulders but are still uniquely positioned to take down the serial winners

arts.ttl: Real Madrid handed major defensive dilemma ahead of Arsenal Champions League tie
arts.sum: Fran Garcia is another option who could start at left-back for Madrid, but it is claimed the 25-year-old didn't impress Ancelotti with his performance in Saturday's 2-1 defeat to Valencia. Real Madrid could reportedly spring a surprise on Arsenal in this week's Champions League quarter-final first leg by fielding David Alaba at left-back.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives verdict on Arsenal's chances of beating Real Madrid in Champions League clash as he insists his side are 'ready to deliver'
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN: The Gunners go into the clash at the Emirates primed for their last realisitc chance of silverware this season, with the competition's 15-time winners the obstacle in the way.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star is a doubt for Arsenal 2nd leg
arts.sum: A leading member of the defensive ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid is a doubt to feature in the return leg of the club’s Champions League quarter-final tie with…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti to Managing Madrid: “Arsenal are very dangerous from set pieces, but we can also do damage at set pieces”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media ahead of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final first leg against Arsenal, and spoke to Kiyan Sobhani of Managing Madrid to “Arsenal are very dangerous from set pieces. Ancelotti on whether Real Madrid can win a title

arts.ttl: Real Madrid preparing for WORLD RECORD Vini Jr transfer
arts.sum: Real Madrid are braced for Vinicius Junior to leave the club in the summer, with rumours of a €300 million switch to the Saudi Pro League gaining strength as the Spanish side grows fed up of the Brazilian’s antics. Vini Jr’s Real Madrid relationship continues to deteriorate

arts.ttl: Sterling misses Arsenal training as youngsters involved ahead of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta put the Gunners squad through their paces for one final time on Monday ahead of Tuesday evening's huge clash. Excitement is building in north London and Arteta, like many others, can't wait for kick-off come 8pm on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Courtois: “In the Champions League there is more adrenaline, instead of going at 100% it’s 110%”
arts.sum: Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois was put forward to speak to the media ahead of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final first leg against Arsenal at the Emirates Stadium, and he spoke the difference with league games, he said, “I don’t think there is a big change. Now we have to change our mindset for the Champions League and play a good game against a good opponent.”
